What We Do

Everything Your Business
Needs Online

From your first website to a fully automated operation — we build it, launch it, and keep it running.

Professional Website

A fast, mobile-first website that looks the part and turns visitors into paying clients. Built for the Kenyan market.

M-Pesa Payments

Accept payments on your website via M-Pesa. Instant notifications, automated receipts, a clean experience clients trust.

Client Acquisition

Systems that bring in enquiries while you work. Automated follow-ups and booking flows — no lead slips through.

Business Automation

Replace repetitive admin with systems that run themselves — invoices, reminders, scheduling.

Online Visibility

Show up when your ideal clients search for what you offer. We build your Google presence so the right people find you.

Not sure where to start?

Get a free
business review

We look at your situation and tell you what will make the biggest difference. Free. No obligation.

Book Assessment →

Why AXIS

We Build Systems,
Not Just Websites

Most agencies hand you a website and disappear. We build everything together — your website, payments, communications, and visibility — so each part makes the others stronger.

Like the Fibonacci sequence, every part of your digital system compounds. Each client brings better clients. The system grows with you.
